content.description:
Renders items as clickable cards suitable for lists and grids. Shows title, truncated preview text, type metadata, and compact tag pills.

## Features

- Title from `item.name`
- 2-line preview from `item.content.description`
- Type name and compact tag pills in footer
- Hover animation (subtle slide and border color)
- Click opens item as sibling window via `api.siblingContainer`

## Use Cases

- Search results
- Tag browser listings
- Compact item indexes
content.hob:
(let [it (get-item (:id item))
      name (or (:name it) (subs (:id it) 0 8))
      preview (or (get-in it [:content :description]) "")
      type-item (get-item (:type it))
      tag-ids (or (get-in it [:content :tags]) [])]
  [:div.compact-card {:style "padding: 12px; margin-bottom: 8px; background: var(--color-bg-surface); border: 1px solid var(--color-border-light); border-radius: var(--border-radius); cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s;"
                      :on-click (fn [e] (open-item! (:id it)))}
    [:div {:style "font-weight: 500; color: var(--color-text); margin-bottom: 6px; overflow: hidden;"}
      name]
    (when (seq preview)
      [:div {:style "font-size: 0.8125rem; color: var(--color-text-secondary); margin-bottom: 6px; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical;"}
        (if (> (count preview) 200) (subs preview 0 200) preview)])
    [:div {:style "display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; gap: 6px; font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--color-border-dark);"}
      [:span (str "Type: " (:name type-item))]
      (for [tag-id tag-ids]
        (let [tag (get-item tag-id)
              color (or (get-in tag [:content :color]) "var(--color-primary)")
              tag-name (or (get-in tag [:content :name]) (:name tag) (subs (:id tag) 0 8))]
          [:span {:style (str "display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 3px; padding: 1px 6px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 0.625rem; cursor: pointer; color: " color "; background: " color "20; border: 1px solid " color "40;")
                  :on-click (fn [e] (open-item! (:id tag)))}
            [:span {:style (str "width: 5px; height: 5px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; background: " color ";")}]
            [:span tag-name]]))]])
